page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 90 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 45 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 720.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks demonstrate top-tier capabilities in multi-core processing and specialized workloads. The instance achieves top 10% performance in multi-core stress-ng tests, software compilation with clang, and ray tracing. Cryptographic operations are highly efficient, supported by hardware-accelerated instructions like AES, VAES, and SHA_NI, which place its encryption performance in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth is strong, reaching 6374.57 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 218.2 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads, though large-block write performance remains in the average tier at 77.77 GB/sec.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and strong multi-threaded performance, this instance is highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local storage. It is well-suited for large-scale database operations, Redis deployments, and medium-scale LLM inference prompt processing. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, making it less suitable for workloads requiring high-speed local disk I/O or hardware-accelerated graphics rendering, but highly optimized for memory-dense in-memory computing.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90 is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor, it delivers 90 dedicated vCPUs across 45 physical cores and 720.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, the c3d-highmem-90 excels in multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and cryptographic execution, placing in the top 10% of tested systems. It also demonstrates strong memory read bandwidth and database processing capabilities. This configuration is highly suited for memory-dense applications, including in-memory databases like Redis, large-scale data processing, and medium-sized language model inference tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90 is a memory-optimized server featuring 90 vCPUs and 720 GB RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 CPU, it delivers top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 90 vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and top-tier multi-core CPU performance.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance with ninety dedicated vCPUs and seven hundred twenty gigabytes of RAM for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 90 dedicated vCPUs and 720 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with AVX-512 and cryptography extensions
Top-tier performance in multi-core processing, software compilation, and encryption
Strong memory read bandwidth and high-throughput Redis database operations
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for in-memory databases, data processing, and LLM inference
